about.name: Shaurya Harkar

about.bio: I develop scalable Flutter applications with smooth UI/UX and integrate machine learning to create smart, responsive products. My work combines strong product intuition with solid engineering, turning ideas into fast, reliable, and user-focused applications.
about.availability: Available for freelance, contract, and full-time opportunities.

projects.name: StudyGrasp
projects.description: A learning app based on a time-constrained forced-learning technique to help students memorize faster and more efficiently.
projects.outcome: Combines an integrated AI chatbot helper named Suresh with a timetable-based lecture notification system to keep study sessions structured and responsive.

projects.name: Netfree Pay
projects.description: A working simulation of an offline UPI payment system built around tokenization and after-sync transaction handling for low-connectivity environments.
projects.outcome: The model captures payment intents offline, verifies them through secure token flows, and syncs them once connectivity returns. It was designed with layered safeguards including bcrypt-based credential protection, AES-256 encryption, SHA-256 hashing, and additional validation checks to keep payment data dependable and secure.

projects.name: Resume Terminal
projects.description: A cinematic resume website that presents professional experience inside a custom terminal-inspired interface.
projects.outcome: Transforms a standard resume into an immersive portfolio presentation with strong personal branding.

projects.name: Algorand App
projects.description: A decentralized application concept focused on stateful workflows, cryptographic interactions, and clear user flows.
projects.outcome: Explores blockchain product UX with a stronger emphasis on accessibility and structured frontend patterns.

projects.name: WhatsApp AI agent for businesses
projects.description: An automation-first messaging workflow designed to triage requests, coordinate queues, and reduce manual overhead.
projects.outcome: Improves response handling through systemized message routing and backend orchestration.I was developed to be applied to a personal CRM system.

contact.cta: Open for collaborations where strong design and dependable engineering need to work together.
